title: Water Lilies!
description: A small resource pack that focuses on making Lily Pads more pretty!
body:
## 📃 Info!

This Resource Pack aims to Visually Improve Swamps & Builds that use Lily Pads in your World!

## Redesingned Lily Pad
![lily pad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bb5c00f5b59c2b296fb21c75895ac78fe67917a.png)
